REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BILQUES SMITH , AN INDIVIDUAL, SOTHEBY'S INTERNATIONAL REALTY, INC. DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION THAT ALLEGE THIS CLAIM WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF SHALL CLARIFY THE MEANING OF THE WORD "THEY" (PLURAL) AS USED IN PARAGRAPH 45 OF FAC. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF IS REFERRED TO AS "SHE" (SINGULAR) ELSEWHERE IN THE COMPLAINT (E.G. PARAGRAPH 4). THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT THIS IS NOT THE ONLY UNCERTAINTY IN THE FAC. SEE PARAGRAPH 5 "IN THIS CASE DEFENDANT VANGUARD AND DEFENDANT COSTA FAILED TO PROVIDE THE PROPER DISCLOSURES AND ALSO FAILED TO DISCLOSE A SERIOUS DEFECTS AT THE PROPERTY." DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY AND NEGLIGENCE IS OVERRULED. ALL ELEMENTS OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION, INCLUDING DUTY, AS SUFFICIENTLY STATED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT BILQUES SMITH , AN INDIVIDUAL, SOTHEBY'S INTERNATIONAL REALTY, INC. DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained as to cause of action for negligent misrepresentation that allege this claim with requisite particularity. Additionally, Plaintiff shall clarify the meaning of the word "they" (plural) as used in paragraph 45 of FAC. The Court notes that Plaintiff is referred to as "she" (singular) elsewhere in the Complaint (e.g. paragraph 4). The Court further notes that this is not the only uncertainty in the FAC. See paragraph 5 "In this case Defendant Vanguard and Defendant Costa failed to provide the proper disclosures and also failed to disclose a serious defects at the Property." Demurrer to the causes of action for breach of fiduciary duty and negligence is OVERRULED. All elements of these causes of action, including duty, as sufficiently stated.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
